legacy.analysis:
The run failed during feature construction with a `KeyError: 'color_u_g'`, so no model was trained and no validation metric was produced. The bug is in `build_line_features()`: it creates color columns as `color_ug`, `color_gr`, etc., but later tries to access `color_u_g` / `color_g_r` style names when building interaction features. Fix the naming mismatch and rerun.

Submission validation failed: stale working/submission.csv from before this node execution
